lines.english: Abandon others, and think of Him alone.
God is the Giver of pain and pleasure.
You shall obtain your pre-ordained destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਛੁ ਕਰੈ ਸੋਈ ਸੁਖੁ ਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jo kachh karai soee sukh maan |
lines.english: Whatever He does - take comfort in that.
What things did you bring with you?
Why do you wander around, you ignorant fool?
O Nanak, thus you shall return to your home with honor. ||4||
You cling to worldly pleasures like a greedy moth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਵਖਰ ਕਉ ਲੈਨਿ ਤੂ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: jis vakhar kau lain too aaeaa |
lines.english: This merchandise, which you have come to obtain
Dwell upon the Lord's Name in your heart.
- the Lord's Name is obtained in the home of the Saints.
Renounce your egotistical pride, and with your mind,
Purchase the Lord's Name - measure it out within your heart.
Load up this merchandise, and set out with the Saints.
"Blessed, blessed", everyone will call you,
Give up other corrupt entanglements.
In this trade, only a few are trading.
Nanak is forever a sacrifice to them. ||5||
and your face shall be radiant in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਸਾਧ ਕੇ ਧੋਇ ਧੋਇ ਪੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: charan saadh ke dhoe dhoe peeo |
lines.english: Wash the feet of the Holy, and drink in this water.
Dedicate your soul to the Holy.
Take your cleansing bath in the dust of the feet of the Holy.
To the Holy, make your life a sacrifice.
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, the Kirtan of the Lord's Praise is sung.
From all sorts of dangers, the Saint saves us.
Service to the Holy is obtained by great good fortune.
All comforts, O Nanak, are so obtained. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਇ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਰਸੁ ਚਾਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: har gun gaae amrit ras chaakhai |
lines.english: Singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, we taste the ambrosial essence.
Seeking the Protection of the Saints, we have come to their door.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟੀ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: sarab nidhaan jaa kee drisattee maeh |
lines.english: All treasures are within His Glance of Grace.
He infuses life back into the dead.
He gives food to the hungry.
People obtain that which they are pre-ordained to receive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਓਹੁ ਕਰਨੈ ਜੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabh kichh tis kaa ohu karanai jog |
lines.english: All things are His; He is the Doer of all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਦੂਸਰ ਹੋਆ ਨ ਹੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: tis bin doosar hoaa na hog |
lines.english: Other than Him, there has never been any other, and there shall never be.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਜਿਸ ਕਉ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa jis kau naam deea |
lines.english: One whom the Lord, in His Grace, blesses with His Name

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਤੇ ਊਚ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਇਹ ਕਰਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: sabh te aooch niramal ih karanee |
lines.english: This way of life is exalted and immaculate.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਜਨ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਦਿਨੁ ਰੈਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: jap jan sadaa sadaa din rainee |
lines.english: Meditate on Him forever and ever, day and night.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਆਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਚੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: tis jan aavai har prabh cheet |
lines.english: comes to dwell upon the Lord God.
- O Nanak, that person becomes immaculate and pure. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਮਨਿ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਪਰਤੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai man gur kee parateet |
lines.english: One who has faith in the Guru in his mind
The One Lord is in his heart.
True is his heart; Truth is what he speaks with his mouth.
He is acclaimed as a devotee, a humble devotee throughout the three worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਕਰਣੀ ਸਚੁ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਰਹਤ ॥
lines.translit: sach karanee sach taa kee rehat |
lines.english: True are his actions; true are his ways.
True is his vision; true is his form.
He distributes Truth and he spreads Truth.
One who recognizes the Supreme Lord God as True

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੂਪੁ ਨ ਰੇਖ ਨ ਰੰਗੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਹੁ ਗੁਣ ਤੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਿੰਨ ॥
lines.translit: roop na rekh na rang kichh trihu gun te prabh bhin |
lines.english: He has no form, no shape, no color; God is beyond the three qualities.
Salok:
- O Nanak, that humble being is absorbed into the True One. ||8||15||
Renounce your love and attachment to people.
Keep the Immortal Lord God enshrined within your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸਹਿ ਬੁਝਾਏ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਜਿਸੁ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੁਪ੍ਰਸੰਨ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tiseh bujhaae naanakaa jis hovai suprasan |1|
lines.english: They alone understand Him, O Nanak, with whom He is pleased. ||1||
Ashtapadee:
The One Lord is pervading among all.
He Himself is All-seeing; He Himself is All-knowing,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਤੇ ਪਰੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਕਿਛੁ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: tis te parai naahee kichh koe |
lines.english: Beyond Him, there is nothing at all.
Unfathomable, Profound, Deep and All-knowing.
To fall at the Feet of Your Holy Beings
He is the Supreme Lord God, the Transcendent Lord, the Lord of the Universe,
the Treasure of mercy, compassion and forgiveness.
